```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.6em 1em 1.4em;border-radius:18px;text-align:center;">

 <div style="display:inline-block;background:#2C3E50;color:#F8F7F0;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.7em;padding:0.5em 1.3em;border-radius:999px;margin-bottom:0.7em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,62,80,0.2);">
  <span style="color:#FFB84D;">?</span> &nbsp; what's the task
 </div>

 <svg viewBox="0 0 200 32" style="width:50%;height:2em;display:block;margin:0 auto 0.5em;" preserveAspectRatio="none">
  <path d="M100,0 L25,30 M100,0 L175,30" stroke="#9B8EA0" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="3 3"/>
 </svg>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.85em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 1em 1em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);position:relative;">
   <div style="position:absolute;top:-0.7em;left:0.95em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2C8475,#3DA18A);color:#F8F7F0;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;padding:0.25em 0.7em;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">one-shot</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;margin-top:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.5em;">→ Assistant</div>
   <ul style="list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0;font-size:0.55em;line-height:1.7;color:#564232;">
    <li>· quick lookup</li>
    <li>· polish a paragraph</li>
    <li>· fits one chat</li>
   </ul>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 1em 1em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);position:relative;">
   <div style="position:absolute;top:-0.7em;left:0.95em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#C4881A,#FFB84D);color:#F8F7F0;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;padding:0.25em 0.7em;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">multi-step</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;margin-top:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.5em;">→ Agent</div>
   <ul style="list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0;font-size:0.55em;line-height:1.7;color:#564232;">
    <li>· refactor across files</li>
    <li>· test, fail, retry</li>
    <li>· anything that loops</li>
   </ul>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.9em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;font-style:italic;">
  workshop assumes <strong style="color:#C4881A;font-style:normal;">agents</strong>
 </div>

</div>
```
